title: Eclipse's Shadow
logline: In a world where eclipses have mystical powers, two unlikely allies must unite to prevent an ancient prophecy from being fulfilled.

acts.summary: The protagonist discovers the power of eclipses, while the antagonist seeks their own dark agenda.
The protagonists embark on a journey to understand the true nature of eclipses, encountering various obstacles along the way.
As the protagonists learn more about eclipses, they realize that the eclipse is not just a natural phenomenon but also holds immense potential for both good and evil.

world_rules: An eclipse can only occur when the moon and sun align perfectly.
